concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive observations about a specific advisor (鱼王), including both criticism (disrespectful behavior, poor time management) and a detailed rebuttal about interview practices. This appears to suppress legitimate content about advising practices rather than performing cleanup.
concerns.excerpt: 鱼王，前一秒说好，后一秒直接玩消失，毫无时间观念...面试聊过，很不尊重学生 (re: 如果指的是phd面试的话我感觉还挺好的？)

concerns.detail: Added text contains censored profanity (*****) and unsupported character judgments ('真歹毒' / truly vicious, '自己来洗了' / self-whitewashing) targeting the professor, constituting personal attacks beyond concrete criticism of advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 〈--- geng自己来洗了？？？好文章？？*****...真歹毒
